name: skill-ledger
description: Cross-harness skill usage auditing with Chinese Markdown reports.

interface.shortDescription: Record skill usage and generate Chinese audit reports.
interface.longDescription: Skill Ledger records discovered and called skills with explicit evidence levels, privacy-aware task context, session isolation, and concise Chinese reports. Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode are verified Tier 1 hosts; other bundled adapters are experimental.
defaultPrompt: Start auditing skill usage for this task.
